story.text:
# 💡 C1-C5 · Core Ratios & Reductions
**concept** · shared · knowledge

The foundational band of the privacy-value model: the golden ratio φ as the optimal Swordsman/Mage (protect:project) ratio (C1); a logarithmic accuracy curve A(τ) (C2); additive edge value (C3); the 96-vs-64 representational discrepancy (C4); and the ~3,000× zero-knowledge-proof reduction (C5).
